reason: Phase 1 of the orders-queue refactor (#522) is a non-visual, additive bookkeeping change: it introduces the Order value type and the orders queue as a parallel mirror of the existing legacy per-order-kind state, driven from the same single apply-once dispatch site, and adds current_order/order_phase to the machine-readable state transcript. It changes no movement/combat math -- verified tick-by-tick that about-face, wheel, file-doubling, and arrow-nudge demos produce byte-identical positions/facings before and after. A recorded battle would look pixel-identical to the pre-change clip, so a clip would show nothing about this change; the transcript diff is the evidence instead.
